Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions about StackZen and our financial tools.

{/* Question 1 */}

What is the 40/30/30 income split method?

The 40/30/30 method is a proven income management strategy where you allocate 40% of your income to needs (essential expenses), 30% to wants (discretionary spending), and 30% to savings and investments. This balanced approach helps you maintain financial stability while building wealth.

{/* Question 2 */}

How secure is my financial data?

We take security seriously. All data is encrypted using bank-level security protocols, and we use read-only connections to your financial accounts. We never store your banking credentials, and all connections are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption.

{/* Question 3 */}

Can I use StackZen with multiple income sources?

Yes! StackZen is designed for people with multiple income streams. You can connect various income sources, including regular employment, freelance work, gig economy earnings, and investments. Our tools help you track and manage all your income in one place.

{/* Question 4 */}

What financial calculators are available?

We offer a comprehensive suite of financial calculators including: • Income Split Calculator for budgeting • Retirement Calculator for long-term planning • Debt Payoff Calculator for managing loans • Emergency Fund Calculator for financial safety All calculators are free to use and provide detailed insights and recommendations.

{/* Question 5 */}

Is there a mobile app available?

Yes! StackZen is fully responsive and works seamlessly on all devices. You can access your dashboard, track expenses, and use all our tools from your smartphone, tablet, or computer. We're also developing native mobile apps for iOS and Android.

{/* Question 6 */}

What's included in the free plan?

Our free plan includes basic income tracking, the 40/30/30 calculator, one financial goal tracker, and access to all our financial calculators. You can upgrade to Pro or Business plans for additional features like unlimited goals, advanced analytics, and team collaboration.

import React from 'react'; import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardFooter, CardDescription, } from '@/components/ui/card'; import { Badge } from '@/components/ui'; import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs'; import { TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Users, DollarSign, Clock, Star, Calendar, BarChart3, PieChart, Activity, } from 'lucide-react'; interface AnalyticsData { totalSessions: number; totalRevenue: number; averageRating: number; activeMentors: number; pendingApplications: number; sessionGrowth: number; revenueGrowth: number; topSpecialties: Array<{ name: string; count: number }>; monthlySessions: Array<{ month: string; sessions: number; revenue: number }>; mentorPerformance: Array<{ name: string; sessions: number; rating: number; revenue: number; }>; } const mockAnalyticsData: AnalyticsData = { totalSessions: 1247, totalRevenue: 187250, averageRating: 4.8, activeMentors: 23, pendingApplications: 7, sessionGrowth: 15.3, revenueGrowth: 22.7, topSpecialties: [ { name: 'Debt Management', count: 156 }, { name: 'Investment Strategy', count: 134 }, { name: 'Retirement Planning', count: 98 }, { name: 'Budgeting', count: 87 }, { name: 'Tax Planning', count: 76 }, ], monthlySessions: [ { month: 'Jan', sessions: 89, revenue: 13450 }, { month: 'Feb', sessions: 102, revenue: 15300 }, { month: 'Mar', sessions: 118, revenue: 17700 }, { month: 'Apr', sessions: 134, revenue: 20100 }, { month: 'May', sessions: 156, revenue: 23400 }, { month: 'Jun', sessions: 178, revenue: 26700 }, ], mentorPerformance: [ { name: 'Sarah Johnson', sessions: 89, rating: 4.9, revenue: 13350 }, { name: 'Michael Chen', sessions: 76, rating: 4.8, revenue: 15200 }, { name: 'Emily Rodriguez', sessions: 67, rating: 4.7, revenue: 8040 }, { name: 'David Thompson', sessions: 54, rating: 4.6, revenue: 9450 }, { name: 'Lisa Wang', sessions: 43, rating: 4.5, revenue: 10750 }, ], }; type Props = object; function AnalyticsDashboard({}: Props) { // In the future, fetch data based on timeRange here (SSR) const _data = mockAnalyticsData; return (
{/* Header */}

Analytics Dashboard

Monitor platform performance and mentor activity

{/* Time range buttons moved to client component */}
{/* Key Metrics */}

Total Sessions

{_data.totalSessions.toLocaleString()}

+{_data.sessionGrowth}%

Total Revenue

${_data.totalRevenue.toLocaleString()}

+{_data.revenueGrowth}%

Average Rating

{_data.averageRating}

out of 5

Active Mentors

{_data.activeMentors}

{_data.pendingApplications} pending
Overview Mentor Performance Specialties Trends
{/* Monthly Sessions Chart */} Monthly Sessions
{_data.monthlySessions.map(item => (
{item.month}
{item.sessions} sessions ${item.revenue.toLocaleString()}
))}
{/* Top Specialties */} Top Specialties
{_data.topSpecialties.map((specialty, index) => (
{index + 1}
{specialty.name}
{specialty.count} sessions
))}
Top Performing Mentors
{_data.mentorPerformance.map((mentor, index) => (
{index + 1}

{mentor.name}

{mentor.sessions} sessions {mentor.rating}

${mentor.revenue.toLocaleString()}

revenue

))}
{_data.topSpecialties.map(specialty => ( {specialty.name}
Total Sessions {specialty.count}

{((specialty.count / _data.totalSessions) * 100).toFixed(1)}% of total sessions

))}
Session Growth Trend
{_data.monthlySessions.map((item, index) => { const _previousSessions = index > 0 ? _data.monthlySessions[index - 1].sessions : item.sessions; const _growth = ((item.sessions - _previousSessions) / _previousSessions) * 100; return (
{item.month}
{item.sessions} sessions = 0 ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-red-600'}`} > {_growth >= 0 ? '+' : ''} {_growth.toFixed(1)}%
); })}
Revenue Growth Trend
{_data.monthlySessions.map((item, index) => { const _previousRevenue = index > 0 ? _data.monthlySessions[index - 1].revenue : item.revenue; const _growth = ((item.revenue - _previousRevenue) / _previousRevenue) * 100; return (
{item.month}
${item.revenue.toLocaleString()} = 0 ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-red-600'}`} > {_growth >= 0 ? '+' : ''} {_growth.toFixed(1)}%
); })}
); } AnalyticsDashboard.displayName = 'AnalyticsDashboard'; export default AnalyticsDashboard;

import Image from 'next/image'; import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog'; import { Button } from '@/components/ui'; import { Badge } from '@/components/ui'; import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs'; import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'; import { Star, CheckCircle, BadgeCheck, Globe, Calendar, Clock, MessageCircle, FileText, Award, Users, } from 'lucide-react'; import { _Mentor } from '../MentorDirectory/MentorCard'; interface MentorProfileModalProps { mentor: Mentor | null; isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void; onBookSession: (mentor: Mentor, sessionType: 'stackzen' | 'direct') => void; } // Mock reviews data const _mockReviews = [ { id: '1', userName: 'Alex Johnson', rating: 5, comment: 'Sarah helped me create a comprehensive retirement plan. Her expertise is unmatched!', date: '2024-06-15', }, { id: '2', userName: 'Maria Garcia', rating: 5, comment: 'Excellent guidance on debt management. I feel much more confident about my financial future.', date: '2024-06-10', }, { id: '3', userName: 'David Chen', rating: 4, comment: 'Great session on investment strategies. Very knowledgeable and patient.', date: '2024-06-08', }, ]; // Mock resources data const _mockResources = [ { id: '1', title: 'Emergency Fund Calculator', type: 'Calculator', description: 'Interactive tool to help you determine your ideal emergency fund size', downloads: 156, }, { id: '2', title: 'Debt Payoff Strategy Guide', type: 'PDF', description: 'Step-by-step guide to creating a debt payoff plan', downloads: 89, }, { id: '3', title: 'Investment Portfolio Template', type: 'Template', description: 'Excel template for tracking your investment portfolio', downloads: 234, }, ]; const MentorProfileModal: React.FC = ({ mentor, isOpen, onClose, onBookSession, }) => { const [selectedSessionType, setSelectedSessionType] = useState<'stackzen' | 'direct'>('stackzen'); if (!mentor) return null; const _stackzenPrice = 65; const _directPrice = mentor.hourlyRate; return ( Mentor Profile
{/* Mentor Header */}

{mentor.name}

{mentor.isCertified && ( StackZen Certified )} {mentor.isVerified && ( Verified )}

{mentor.bio}

{mentor.rating.toFixed(1)} ({mentor.totalSessions} sessions) {mentor.yearsOfExperience} years experience {mentor.languages.join(', ')}
Overview Reviews Resources Book Session {/* Specialties */} Specialties
{mentor.specialties.map(specialty => ( {specialty} ))}
{/* Credentials */} Credentials & Certifications
{mentor.credentials.map(credential => ( {credential} ))}
{/* Availability */} Availability
{mentor.availability.map(day => ( {day} ))}
{mockReviews.map(review => (
{review.userName}
{[...Array(review.rating)].map((_, i) => ( ))}
{new Date(review.date).toLocaleDateString()}

{review.comment}

 ))}
{mockResources.map(resource => ( {resource.title}

{resource.description}

{resource.type} {resource.downloads} downloads
))}
{/* StackZen Session */} setSelectedSessionType('stackzen')} > StackZen Certified Session
${stackzenPrice} Fixed Price
  • 30-minute session
  • Guaranteed quality
  • Quick support focus
{/* Direct Booking */} setSelectedSessionType('direct')} > Direct Booking
${directPrice}/hr Custom Duration
  • Flexible duration
  • Deep dive sessions
  • Custom scheduling
); }; export default MentorProfileModal;
